name: the new azure/gcp/cfn probe answers are grounded (no ungrounded concern added)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile v11.json --out req.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>tt.err; grep -qE 'probes_consumed=[1-9]' tt.err && grep -q 'needs_grounding=0' tt.err && echo cloud-probes-grounded 1>&2
setup: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "AWS with CloudFormation, Azure, and Google Cloud" --answers p.json --probe-answer cfn:cfn_stack_policy=protected --probe-answer azure:azure_region_strategy=multi-region --probe-answer gcp:gcp_region_strategy=multi-region --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
